'''Kristoffer Tabori''' voiced [[HK-47]] in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''. He voiced HK-47 again in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', as well as the [[HK-50 series assassin droid|HK-50]] series [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droids]] (some of which were cut from the final game), and all the HK droids in [[Star Wars: The Old Republic]].
